references.text: Blasdell, RF. 1963. A monographic study of the fern genus Cystopteris. Memoirs of the Torrey Botanical Club 21: 1-102.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona, 23 June 2019

species.citation: (Blume) Tagawa , Acta Phytotax. Geobot. 7 (1938) 73; ≡ Cystopteris tenuisecta (Blume) Mett. , Ann. Mus. Bot. Lugduno-Batavi 1 (1864) 241; ≡ Aspidium tenuisectum Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 170. = Ctenitis tenerifrons (Christ) Copel. , Gen. Fil. (Copel.) (1947) 125; ≡ Hypolepis tenerifrons Christ , PJS 3c (1908) 274.
species.distribution: Bhutan, Borneo, China, India, Japan, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Taiwan, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, MINDORO.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona, 23 June 2019

species.citation: (Baker) Ching , Contr. Biol. Lab. Sci. Soc. China 9 (1933) 40; ≡ Polypodium oyamense Baker , J. Bot. 15 (1877) 366. = Currania gracilipes Copel. , PJS 4c (1909) 112.
species.distribution: Bhutan, China, India, Japan, Moluccas, Nepal, New Guinea, Philippines, Taiwan, Tibet. LUZON: Benguet, Ifugao, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya.
